one_time_description: Treaty Land Entitlement settlement received, with $30,774,613 transferred to trust and $16,470,000 paid as member settlement payout
economic_notes: First Nation holds a unit in Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership (OFNLP) receiving 1.7% of provincial gross gaming revenues. New Gold Inc. portfolio investment held at cost ($361,125). ISC funding represents 84% of revenue (2020: 74%). Water treatment plant and duplex construction underway. Band office construction planned with $3.5M demand loan facility.
notes: Major one-time Treaty Land Entitlement settlement of $48,224,377 received in 2021 (nil in prior year), with $30,774,613 transferred to trust and $16,470,000 paid as member settlement payout, causing revenue and expenses to be significantly inflated versus normal operations. Consolidated entity includes CMHC Housing. Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership interest held at nominal value and not consolidated (equity method not applied - carrying value nominal). Construction in progress of $23,140,202 for water treatment plant and duplexes not yet amortized. Audit report dated July 19, 2022 for March 31, 2021 year-end, resulting in non-compliance with First Nations Financial Transparency Act submission deadline. No schedule of remuneration disclosed in the extracted text. OSR calculated as total revenue ($73,283,898) minus total government transfers ($24,933,533) = $48,350,365, which includes the large TLE settlement.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
